mapper.insert: INSERT INTO customer_level_config ( level_code, level_name, upgrade_threshold_amount, sort_no, status, remark, created_by, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{levelCode}, #{levelName}, #{upgradeThresholdAmount}, #{sortNo}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{operatorId}, #{operatorId}, 0 ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE level_name = VALUES(level_name), upgrade_threshold_amount = VALUES(upgrade_threshold_amount), sort_no = VALUES(sort_no), status = VALUES(status), remark = VALUES(remark), updated_by = VALUES(updated_by), updated_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE customer_info customer SET customer.accumulated_paid_amount = COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(order_info.pay_amount) FROM order_info order_info WHERE order_info.deleted = 0 AND order_info.customer_id = customer.id AND order_info.order_status = 'FINISHED' ), 0.00) WHERE customer.deleted = 0
